Bash(py -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) logs = d.get\('logs', []\) task_logs = [l for l in logs if l.get\('TaskID'\) == 'TK-1775404355683'] print\(f'Total logs fetched: {len\(logs\)}'\) print\(f'Logs for TK-1775404355683: {len\(task_logs\)}'\) statuses = {} errors = [] for l in task_logs: s = l.get\('Status','?'\) statuses[s] = statuses.get\(s, 0\) + 1 if s not in \('accepted', 'sent'\): errors.append\({'ProviderID': l.get\('ProviderID'\), 'Status': s, 'Error': l.get\('ErrorMessage',''\)[:80]}\) print\(f'Status breakdown: {statuses}'\) if errors: print\(f'Failed/error entries:'\) for e in errors: print\(f' {e}'\) else: print\('No failures.'\) ")

PowerShell($queries = @\("HC Road","hc road","H-C-Road","Sardarpura","Jaljog-Residency Belt","randomxyz"\); foreach \($q in $queries\) { $enc = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($q\); try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/area-intelligence/resolve?query=$enc" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content } catch { $r = "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "[$q] -> $r" })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin/area-intelligence-test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content; if \($html -match "Area Intelligence Test"\) { "TITLE OK" } else { "TITLE MISSING" }; if \($html -match "Resolve Area"\) { "BUTTON OK" } else { "BUTTON MISSING" }; if \($html -match "/api/area-intelligence/resolve"\) { "ENDPOINT WIRED" } else { "ENDPOINT NOT REFERENCED IN MARKUP \(expected for client-only fetch\)" })

PowerShell($queries = @\("HC Road","Sardarpura","Jaljog-Residency Belt","randomxyz"\); foreach \($q in $queries\) { $enc = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($q\); try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/area-intelligence/resolve?query=$enc" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content } catch { $r = "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "[$q] -> $r" })

PowerShell($html = Get-Content -Raw C:\\tmp\\ai-data.html; foreach \($needle in @\("Area Intelligence Data","service_regions","service_region_areas","service_region_area_aliases","Sardarpura","HC Road","Jaljog","High Court Road","total","Failed to load"\)\) { if \($html -match [regex]::Escape\($needle\)\) { "FOUND: $needle" } else { "MISSING: $needle" } })
